stations.name: Closest stations are Coorparoo and Cannon Hill

buses.note: Bus routes serve Carina Heights via Old Cleveland Road.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 14 to 18 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Westfield Carindale is a short drive for big-format retail and dining. Camp Hill Marketplace and Coorparoo Square are within reach.

pockets.name: Elevated streets
pockets.character: Hilltop blocks with outlooks. Premium pocket.

pockets.name: Whites Hill catchment
pockets.character: Streets within the catchment carry a clear premium.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers targeting the topography and the catchment combination.
Buyers priced out of Camp Hill who want similar topography and catchment access.
